narrative:
Addison Twp township has 1,336 registered voters, with 57.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.2 percentage points.
